description.value: Price 20,315 gp; Slot none; CL 9th; Weight 5 lbs.; Aura moderate enchantment DESCRIPTION Once per day within 1 minute of using this +1 valiant scimitar to kill or knock unconscious a foe, as a standard action, the wielder can inspire all allies within 60 feet who can see her. Those allies gain a +2 morale bonus on attack rolls, skill checks, and saving throws for 10 minutes. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 10,315 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells good hope, true strike
